name: NOBLE ROMANS INC
summary: Noble Romans, Inc. is an Indiana corporation founded in 1972 that sells and services franchises and licenses, and operates Company-owned restaurants under the trade names Noble Romans Craft Pizza & Pub, Noble Romans Pizza, Noble Romans Take-N-Bake, and Tuscanos Italian Style Subs. The Company operates stand-alone full-service restaurants and non-traditional foodservice locations (within convenience stores, hospitals, entertainment facilities, etc.) across the United States, generating revenue through franchise fees, royalties, and proprietary ingredient sales.

products.name: Noble Romans Craft Pizza & Pub
products.description: Full-service restaurant format offering craft pizza, beer, wine, pasta, salads, and breadsticks with dough made fresh in customer view.

products.name: Noble Romans Pizza (Non-Traditional)
products.description: Franchised pizza operations within convenience stores, hospitals, and entertainment facilities using shelf-stable prepared crusts and proprietary ingredients.

products.name: Noble Romans Take-N-Bake
products.description: Take-and-bake pizza product offered as an add-on component for non-traditional franchise locations.

products.name: Tuscanos Italian Style Subs
products.description: Baked sub sandwich brand operated under franchise and license agreements.

products.name: Noble Romans Craft Pizza & Pub
products.description: Full-service restaurant format featuring craft pizza, beer, wine, salads, pasta, and breadsticks with dough made from scratch in customer view.

products.name: Noble Romans Pizza for Non-Traditional Locations
products.description: Franchised pizza operations within host businesses like convenience stores, hospitals, and entertainment facilities using shelf-stable fully-prepared crusts.

products.name: Noble Romans Take-N-Bake
products.description: Take-and-bake pizza product offered as an add-on component for non-traditional franchise locations.

products.name: Tuscanos Italian Style Subs
products.description: Italian-style sub sandwich brand operated under franchise and license agreements.

products.name: Pizza Valet Service
products.description: Curbside carry-out service allowing customers to order ahead and receive orders at reserved valet parking spaces without leaving their vehicle.

partnerships.description: Development agreement signed October 2023 for 100 non-traditional franchise locations to be developed prior to September 30, 2026.
Development agreement signed October 2023 for 100 non-traditional franchise locations to be developed prior to September 30, 2026, primarily in southern United States.
